audits.name: Code4rena March 2024
key_findings: HIGH: USDC depeg risk in OUSGInstantManager - excessive OUSG minting during depeg. Mitigated by adding Chainlink USDC/USD oracle.
MEDIUM: OUSG Instant Redemption Manager BUIDL redemption limits oversight

audits.name: Code4rena September 2023
key_findings: MEDIUM: Bridged messages receive automatic approval during execution - threshold numberOfApprovalsNeeded requires minimum of two

audits.name: Halborn July 2024
audits.scope: Ondo Tokenized Treasury Bill Additional Aura Module

audits.name: Spearbit June 2025
audits.scope: Ondo Global Markets tokenized stocks platform

exploit_history.name: Tranche Token Vulnerability (iosiro)
exploit_history.details: Vulnerability in Tranche Token and surrounding contracts. Relied on feature intended for later activation. No user funds at risk at time of disclosure. Remediated with $25,000 bounty.

code_health.upgrade_mechanism: Transparent Upgradeable Proxy pattern (USDY/OUSG). Governance timelock not explicitly detailed in public sources, but ONDO DAO requires 100M ONDO minimum for proposal initiation.

dependencies.name: BlackRock
dependencies.notes: Off-chain custodian holding underlying U.S. Treasury securities. Single point of failure for asset backing.

dependencies.name: Ankura Trust Company
dependencies.service: Independent security agent and verification for tokenized assets
dependencies.notes: Holds first-priority security interest in underlying assets. Conducts daily attestations. Covers USDY administration and Ondo Global Markets holdings.

dependencies.name: U.S. Broker-Dealer Custodians
dependencies.service: Custody of tokenized stocks and RWA holdings
dependencies.notes: All Ondo Global Markets holdings with U.S.-registered custodians. Subject to regulatory framework.

dependencies.name: SPV Structure (Bankruptcy Remoteness)
dependencies.provider: Ondo USDY LLC / Ondo Global Markets (BVI) Limited
dependencies.notes: Separate legal entities from Ondo Finance Inc. Assets protected from parent company insolvency. Independent Board of Directors with independent director.

dependencies.name: Chainlink Oracle (USDC/USD)
dependencies.service: USDC depeg price feed for OUSGInstantManager
dependencies.notes: Added post-Code4rena March 2024 audit to mitigate HIGH severity finding on USDC depeg risk.

rationale: ONDO is a Real World Assets (RWA) platform with relatively simple token contracts (OUSG T-Bill derivative, USDY yield-bearing stablecoin, OMMF fund shares). Smart contract risk is LOW—only 1 HIGH severity audit finding (USDC depeg, now mitigated with Chainlink oracle) and 4 MEDIUM findings across all audits. No successful exploits on ONDO token itself. PRIMARY RISK is off-chain: (1) Custody concentration on BlackRock for OUSG T-bill collateral and Ankura for USDY administration—both single points of failure for asset backing. (2) Regulatory exposure (Reg S/Reg D securities issuance limits, SEC enforcement closure in 2025 clears path forward but remains jurisdiction-sensitive). (3) SPV bankruptcy remoteness is well-structured but dependent on legal precedent in BVI/Delaware. (4) KYC/whitelisting requirements create operational friction and regulatory dependency. Strong audit coverage (9 audits 2023-2025 from Code4rena, Halborn, Spearbit, Zokyo, NetherMind) and active bug bounty ($500k+) demonstrate commitment to smart contract security. Governance uses transparent proxy upgrades with 100M ONDO threshold for proposals. Overall: ON-CHAIN SECURITY is solid; OFF-CHAIN/CUSTODIAL RISK is material.
